prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约25547→28086→58243→26790→40718。2023年出现明显断档（约58243名），2024年大幅回弹至26790名，2025年受陕西新高考改革（理科转物理类）影响再次后移至40718名，近两年波动剧烈。2025年基准位次约40718名；该校在陕西理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2025年均为100人，2026年仍为100人，招生规模连续六年持平，无扩招或缩招变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第134名，近年排名在130–160区间波动，属于中后段211院校；2023年声誉评价偏正面（食堂服务好、投诉处理及时）；抖音热度总排名第86位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约22.5万，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平；2022年曾出现投档线逐年下降的舆情关注，但近年未见明显负面信号；第五轮学科评估中，畜牧学获评A，作物学获评A-，是该校核心优势学科，与招生专业中的动物科学、农学等直接对应，对农林类考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高（高热推荐/推荐），而农林类专业热度一般；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34000人（增幅约19.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；2026年；四川农业大学位于四川省（成都/雅安），与陕西地理相邻，跨省报考接受度较高；该校在陕西招生占比约0.9%（2025年陕西招生50人/全国约5575人），属外省中等规模招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移（受新高考改革影响）、2026年招生计划持平、陕西省物理类考生显著增加约19.7%等因素，竞争压力上升将推动录取位次小幅前移。预计2026年最低位次约40318名，区间39818–40818名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约40318名，区间39818–40818名。建议位次在39800名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档热门工科专业（计算机、电气、大数据）；位次在39800–40800名之间的考生以二档专业为主力选择（农学、动物科学等优势学科及金融、财务等经管类专业）；位次在40800名以后的考生可考虑三档专业保底（法学、土木、建筑等）。该校畜牧学A、作物学A-为优势学科，对农林方向感兴趣的考生可重点关注农学、动物科学等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 25547 → 28086 → 58243 → 26790 → 40718. In 2023, there was a clear gap (about 58243), with a significant rebound to 26790 in 2024. In 2025, due to the new college entrance exam reform in Shaanxi (science to physics category), the ranking shifted back to 40718, showing drastic fluctuations in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 40718; the enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi from 2021 to 2025 was 100 students each year, and it remains 100 for 2026, with the enrollment scale unchanged for six consecutive years, no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 134th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 130-160 in recent years, belonging to the mid-to-lower tier of 211 institutions; reputation evaluation in 2023 was relatively positive (good cafeteria service, timely complaint handling); overall Douyin popularity ranking 86th, rated as 'average', with comprehensive popularity around 225,000, indicating low-to-medium exposure on short video platforms; in 2022, there was public attention on the declining admission scores over years, but no significant negative signals recently; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science received an A rating, Crop Science received an A-, which are the core advantageous disciplines of the university, directly corresponding to majors like Animal Science and Agronomy in enrollment, attracting some agriculture and forestry-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended), while agriculture and forestry majors have average popularity; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 34,000 (approximately 19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025, indicating a significant expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition; in 2026; Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Sichuan Province (Chengdu/Ya'an), geographically adjacent to Shaanxi, with high acceptance for cross-province applications; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 0.9% (50 students in Shaanxi in 2025 / about 5,575 nationwide), representing a medium-scale enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings (affected by the new college entrance exam reform), unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and a notable increase of about 19.7% in physics category candidates in Shaanxi, the rising competitive pressure will push the admission ranking slightly forward. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be about 40318, with a range of 39818–40818.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 40318, range 39818–40818. Candidates with rankings within 39800 are advised to focus on Tier 1 popular engineering majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Big Data); those with rankings between 39800–40800 should mainly choose Tier 2 majors (advantageous disciplines like Agronomy, Animal Science, and economics/management majors like Finance, Financial Management); candidates with rankings above 40800 can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options (Law, Civil Engineering, Architecture, etc.). The university's Animal Science (A) and Crop Science (A-) are advantageous disciplines, and candidates interested in agriculture and forestry directions should pay special attention to majors like Agronomy and Animal Science.
